input.code:
# Step 1: Load raw counts and metadata, create DESeqDataSet
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)

# Read counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)

# Ensure counts is a matrix (integer)
counts <- as.matrix(counts)
storage.mode(counts) <- 'integer'

print(dim(counts))
print(head(rownames(counts)))
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts,
                               colData = metadata,
                               design = ~ cell_type)

print(dds)
